source: hand-curated from public BTD6 reference data

abilities.name: Rapid Shot
abilities.summary: Triple attack speed for a short time.

abilities.name: Storm of Arrows
abilities.summary: Covers a large area in a deadly rain of arrows.

abilities.name: Cocktail of Fire
abilities.summary: Hurls a flask of flammable liquid, burning Bloons that pass through the fire.

abilities.name: Firestorm
abilities.summary: Sets the whole screen alight, burning all Bloons and granting the Heat It Up buff to all Monkeys.

abilities.name: Concussive Shell
abilities.summary: Shoots a guided shell following target priority, stunning whatever Bloon it hits.

abilities.name: Artillery Command
abilities.summary: Resets cooldown on all Bomb Shooters and Mortar Monkeys.

abilities.name: Brambles
abilities.summary: Creates a spiked bush on the track that can pop 50 bloons. Lasts multiple rounds if not destroyed.

abilities.name: Wall of Trees
abilities.summary: Summons a wall of trees across the track that destroy all Bloons that enter. When full, the trees burst into money.

abilities.name: Armor Piercing Shells
abilities.summary: Shots can pop Black Bloons and do extra damage to Ceramic Bloons. Duration increases as Churchill levels.

abilities.name: MOAB Barrage
abilities.summary: Launches a barrage of shells at up to 10 MOAB-class Bloons on screen, dealing massive damage each time.

abilities.name: Biohack
abilities.summary: 4 closest Monkeys pop an extra layer per attack for 6 seconds. Affected Monkeys can't attack for 2 seconds after effect ends.

abilities.name: Syphon Funding
abilities.summary: Downgrades most newly spawned Bloons by 1 rank. Cash per pop from affected Bloons is double. Lasts 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Heartstopper
abilities.summary: slow Bloons, allow Purple popping and prevents any regrow from happening for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: MOAB Hex
abilities.summary: places a curse on a MOAB-Class Bloon, it takes damage every second until annihilated.

abilities.name: Rallying Roar
abilities.summary: All nearby Monkeys can pop +1 layer for a short time.

abilities.name: Big Squeeze
abilities.summary: Grabs a MOAB, BFB, DDT (if visible), or ZOMG and crushes it to bits over 5 seconds.

abilities.name: The Long Arm of Light
abilities.summary: Greatly increases attack range and power for a short time & damages all Bloon Types.

abilities.name: Ball of Light
abilities.summary: Brings forth a powerful ball of energy to strike down the Bloons.

abilities.name: Naval Tactics
abilities.summary: greatly increases attack speed of Brickell and nearby water-based Monkeys for a short time.

abilities.name: Mega Mine
abilities.summary: deploys to any water area a devastating Mine that triggers on MOABs and stuns nearby Bloons. Mega Mines last 3 rounds.

abilities.name: Drone Swarm Ability
abilities.summary: Etienne launches 4 more temporary drones to wreak some Bloon popping havoc.

abilities.name: UCAV ability
abilities.summary: high altitude surveillance drone becomes devastating combat drone for a short time.

abilities.name: Leaping Sword Attack
abilities.summary: Sauda's dramatic Lead popping leap attack slams down on her targeted Bloons.

abilities.name: Sword Charge
abilities.summary: Sauda slides along the whole track, devastating Bloons as she goes.

abilities.name: Psychic Blast
abilities.summary: Psi unleashes a wave of power that stuns nearby Bloons for a long time.

abilities.name: Psionic Scream
abilities.summary: Psi unleashes a silent scream that throws the Bloons into utter chaos.

abilities.name: See Invisibility Potion
abilities.summary: grants short term camo detection to a Monkey Tower or Hero. Geraldo's attack range increases.

abilities.name: Pet Rabbit
abilities.summary: aww what a cute widdle bunny wabbit!

abilities.name: Soul Harvest Ability
abilities.summary: Harvests nearby Bloons in an instant. Learns: Echo, Haste

abilities.name: Dark Ritual ability
abilities.summary: Harvest a huge number of Bloons near Corvus. Trample does more damage to more Bloons. Learns: Recovery

abilities.name: Scatter missile ability
abilities.summary: Rosalia's workshop launches a missile that rains destruction from above.

abilities.name: Kinetic Charge Ability
abilities.summary: Charge attaches to a Bloon, harnessing energy when the target takes damage. Then releases accumulated energy in a huge detonation.

abilities.name: Frostbite ability
abilities.summary: Silas can hit all Bloons while active. When hitting frozen Bloons, target takes extra damage based on remaining freeze time.

abilities.name: Frozen Burial ability
abilities.summary: Immediately freezes and damages all Bloons, dealing far more damage to already frozen Bloons. Then fills the track with Ice Walls.
